main.description: A named Tass form — the coincidental shape crystallized quintessence takes in reality. Defines the materialize cost (q spent to bring the form into being) and total capacity (max q the form can hold). Referenced from tassilize records via formRef.

materializeCost.description: Quintessence spent to bring this form into being (the cost side of the cost/capacity ratio)

totalCapacity.description: Maximum quintessence this form can hold once materialized
